We are past peak base effect for headline inflation. The deceleration will be slower from now.

In a couple of months the same thing will happen to core inflation.

The US isn’t going to hit the 2% target anytime soon. https://t.co/1VzYLw23IV

Heading back to Egypt for the rest of the summer.

Over the past 18 months or so, the Egyptian currency has been cut in half relative to the dollar.

So my little wad of cash that I had lingering from last time that I will be bringing with me is worth less.

So does this mean homeowners are refinancers are shifting to adjustable rate mortgages (ARMs)?

According to the Mortgage Bankers statistics, not really.  

Less than 7% of the volume of mortgages is adjustable rates. https://t.co/kHMuh9AeaS
